_meta.title: Versa OMS Workflow & Journey Registry
_meta.purpose: The dictionary of end-to-end business chains. Code ONE workflow chain at a time, end-to-end through all completion gates (ARCH_RUNTIME_CHECKLIST §16 + P0.10 UI wiring), before starting the next. Pick the next chain by execution order (dependencies). See BUILD_PROCESS.md 'workflow-at-a-time' rule.
_meta.single_source: modules_touched reference real spec/modules/<id>; e2e_specs reference real tests/e2e/<file>. _validation/check_workflows.py validates those exist (no parallel truth) and DERIVES per-workflow status (built/partial/planned) from the repo — status is NOT hand-maintained here.
_meta.completion_gates: ARCH_RUNTIME_CHECKLIST.md §16 (Journey Completion) + §17 (test matrices) + P0.10 (UI upstream+downstream). A workflow is 'built' only when every module is wired (service + UI page) and the chain has a passing e2e journey.
_meta.ported_from: founder's versa_workflow_autogen_validator.py WORKFLOW_TEMPLATES (adapted to this repo's modules + e2e specs).

workflows.name: CRM Lead to School Activation
workflows.business_goal: Convert a school lead into an activated school with onboarding completed and portal access enabled.
workflows.end_state: school.status=active and school portal access enabled

workflows.name: School Activation to Roster Lock
workflows.business_goal: Activated school submits a roster, it is validated, corrected, locked, and candidate IDs generated.

workflows.name: Invoice to Finance Gate
workflows.business_goal: Generate an invoice, confirm payment, and open the finance gate for exam readiness.
workflows.end_state: invoice paid and participation payment gate open

workflows.name: Exam Slot Confirmation to Material Readiness
workflows.business_goal: Assign/confirm an exam slot (capacity-gated) so material generation becomes eligible.

workflows.name: Material Generation to Secure School Download
workflows.business_goal: Generate/approve/release exam material; school downloads it within the release window via a signed URL.
workflows.end_state: material downloaded via short-lived signed URL, audited; only after release

workflows.name: Courier Dispatch to Receipt
workflows.business_goal: Dispatch physical materials, track logistics, confirm receipt, raise incidents.

workflows.name: Answer Sheets to Score Batch
workflows.business_goal: School returns answer sheets; approve key, import/validate OMR responses, generate scores.
workflows.end_state: score batch generated and ready for results

workflows.name: Score Batch to Results Publication
workflows.business_goal: Generate ranked results, snapshot eligibility, publish, and make them visible to schools.
workflows.end_state: result_batch published; school results visible; published results immutable

workflows.name: Certificate Generation to Public Verification
workflows.business_goal: Generate/publish certificates from eligible results; expose minimal, tamper-evident public verification.

workflows.name: Support Ticket to Resolution
workflows.business_goal: Create/triage/resolve school support tickets without exposing restricted data.
chain: safe context linked (internal notes hidden from school)

workflows.name: Sensitive Export Approval to Download
workflows.business_goal: Request/approve/generate/download sensitive exports with masking, signed URL, and audit.
workflows.end_state: private export generated, downloaded via short signed URL, audited

workflows.name: Role/Scope Change with Maker-Checker
workflows.business_goal: Request/approve role or scope changes safely: no self-approval, no last-super-admin removal.
workflows.end_state: role/scope changed only after valid approval, or request rejected

workflows.name: Notification Template to Delivery
workflows.business_goal: Render events from approved templates, fan out to recipients, dispatch, track delivery.
workflows.end_state: events fanned out to recipient batches from approved templates; delivery tracked

workflows.name: Admin Setting Change Governance
workflows.business_goal: Change feature flags/policies/providers through governed, versioned, audited updates.
workflows.end_state: setting/policy/flag version updated with audit + review trail

workflows.name: Security Incident and Audit Drift Review
workflows.business_goal: Detect permission/audit drift, create incidents, assign tasks, verify remediation.
workflows.end_state: incident reviewed, findings tracked, audit/security health updated

workflows.name: Full Olympiad Operations Happy Path
workflows.business_goal: The full operating chain from school lead to published, publicly-verifiable certificates.
workflows.end_state: school has published results + certificates with public verification active
